_comment: Human-in-the-loop risk policy. CRITICAL actions ALWAYS require a human approval before executing (money movement, account/role changes, fraud rulings, deletes). HIGH actions require approval when a money amount >= autoApproveMoneyUnder (0 = always require) or when no amount applies. Everything else (low) auto-executes and is audit-logged. To let small payouts auto-clear once you trust the agents, raise autoApproveMoneyUnder (e.g. 5 = auto-approve under $5). Matching is by substring on the action/entity name, case-insensitive.
